meta.northy_message: Saturday morning, 2am. Nothing's changed since 9:30pm — but nothing was resolved either. Zig's still blocked. ESC-10 deadline passed unconfirmed. Garland's Monday. You spent Friday on infrastructure. Weekend's the test: three calls before you open a terminal. The ESC distribution engine is firing — Zig's outbound report proves it. Fix the one config flag and the whole system breathes again.

act_now.title: Zig's Pipeline BLOCKED — mcp.publish_skills Is Still False. Fix This Before Granting More Permissions.
act_now.detail: Steve granted Zig merge_or_release scoped to bookmarked-sales-dashboard on Friday. That's the permissions layer. But Zig still can't access HubSpot because mcp.publish_skills is false — he posted a BLOCKED notice in #sales_revenue-ninjas on Thursday and nothing changed. The daily sales automation Jan documented is offline. The Monday weekly report won't run. Live HubSpot data shows deals being updated (Pearland, Northside, Bruceville-Eddy all modified Friday) — but Zig can't see any of it. Permission layers don't matter when the door is locked.
act_now.action: Run: gbrain config set mcp.publish_skills true. Then reply to Zig's BLOCKED post: 'Unblocked. Retry.' One command. 60 seconds.

act_now.title: ESC-10 Proposal — Deadline Was Friday. It's Now Saturday. No Confirmation.
act_now.detail: The workspace was 'In progress' at last check. No transcript, no G-Brain update, no Slack confirmation. The follow-up meeting is July 29, so a late submission is recoverable — but radio silence after deadline day isn't. If it went out and you just didn't update anything: kill this item. If it didn't: send it today. A 2-page skeleton sent Saturday beats no proposal at all.
act_now.action: Send whatever exists today. Then post in #ai-ceo-team: 'ESC-10 proposal sent. Follow-up July 29.'

act_now.title: Garland $140K — 2 Days to June 30. Moak Casey Lever Still Available.
act_now.detail: Monday is the deadline. No evidence Jodi Duron's email to Dr. Rick Lopez was sent. She agreed in May to make the intro after the Michael Ruiz debrief. That debrief happened. Nobody followed up. Live HubSpot shows Garland last modified Thursday — no Friday activity. This is going cold.
act_now.action: DM Jodi today: 'Jodi — we debriefed, and I'd love you to put in the word with Dr. Lopez now. Garland's quote deadline is Monday and Michael's been hard to reach.'

act_now.title: CONTRADICTION: Zig's Target Is $1.5M/Aug 1. Yours Is $1M/Sept 1. 5th Scan. Resolve Before Monday.
act_now.detail: Still unresolved since June 25. Five scans. Zig's Monday weekly will run against the wrong number. Jan and Teela will follow Zig's lead. If the canonical target really is $1M/Sept 1, say so in #sales_revenue-ninjas before Monday morning. If it's actually $1.5M/Aug 1, update the strategy brief.
act_now.action: Post in #sales_revenue-ninjas: 'Quick alignment — canonical target is $1M ARR by Sept 1. Zig, run reports against that.' Or confirm $1.5M/Aug 1 is real.
